items.html: And from these — AB [72] and RIU [216] — the Mochin of ZA [Zeir Anpin] are made. Thus the pure air [Avira Dachya] and the pure fire [Esha Dachya] mentioned in the Yesod of Ima were joined, and from them the Galgalta [skull] of ZA was corrected, as mentioned in the Idra; and by the power of these two, the Daat of ZA is made. And you already know that the Daat of ZA is made of the Yesod of Aba and the Yesod of Ima — which is this very matter we have spoken of; understand it. And since this Avira [air], after Aba bequeathed it to Ima, is called hers — this is why we say that the NHY [Netzah, Hod, Yesod] of Ima are the Mochin of ZA, and we do not count Aba: for even the Avira that came out of him is already reckoned as of Ima herself.
